# Georesolve Africa

Georesolve Africa is a geoscience consultancy (founded in Uganda) providing expert geophysical surveys, geotechnical investigations, mining and exploration services, drilling, GIS and drone surveys across Uganda, Rwanda, Burundi, DRC, and South Sudan. Headquartered in Kasangati, Kampala, Uganda, the firm delivers data-driven, research-based geoscience solutions for infrastructure, energy, mining, water, and environmental projects.

## Services
- [Methods & Services](https://georesolveafrica.com/methods.html) - Geophysical surveys, geotechnical engineering, mineral exploration, drilling, GIS and geospatial services.
- [Applications](https://georesolveafrica.com/applications.html) - Dam foundations, hydropower, infrastructure, mining, water supply, environmental projects.

## Service Pages
- [Drone Magnetic Survey Uganda](https://georesolveafrica.com/drone-magnetic-survey-uganda.html) - High-resolution airborne magnetic surveys using AeroSmartMag Overhauser magnetometer on DJI M300 RTK. First airborne mag sensor operated by a Ugandan company. Mineral exploration, geological mapping, and structural interpretation across East Africa.
- [Ground Magnetic Survey Uganda](https://georesolveafrica.com/ground-magnetic-survey-uganda.html) - High-resolution ground magnetic exploration surveys using GSM 19 Overhauser walking magnetometer with built-in GPS. Magnetic anomaly mapping for mineral exploration, structural interpretation, and geological mapping across East Africa.
- [SAR & InSAR Services Uganda](https://georesolveafrica.com/insar-sar-services-uganda.html) - Satellite SAR and InSAR radar interferometry services using ESA Sentinel-1. Millimetre-level ground deformation monitoring, landslide assessment, subsidence mapping, and structural interpretation across Uganda and East Africa. No ground equipment required.
- [Seismic Refraction Survey Uganda](https://georesolveafrica.com/seismic-refraction-uganda.html) - P-wave velocity profiling for bedrock depth, rippability, and foundation characterisation. Seismic refraction tomography for dams, railways, bridges, and irrigation infrastructure across East Africa.
- [ERT Survey Uganda](https://georesolveafrica.com/ert-electrical-resistivity-tomography-uganda.html) - 2D/3D Electrical Resistivity Tomography for dam foundations, groundwater exploration, geothermal assessment, and mineral exploration. Resistivity imaging across East Africa.
- [Downhole & Crosshole Seismic Survey Uganda](https://georesolveafrica.com/downhole-seismic-survey-uganda.html) - In-situ Vp and Vs wave velocity profiling for Seismic Site Class, low-strain modulus, and foundation dynamic characterisation. Downhole and crosshole seismic for dams and infrastructure across East Africa.
- [Crosshole Seismic Survey Uganda](https://georesolveafrica.com/crosshole-seismic-survey-uganda.html) - In-situ P-wave and S-wave velocity measurement between boreholes. High-resolution shear-wave profiling for dam foundations, seismic site class, and low-strain modulus across East Africa.
- [MASW Survey Uganda](https://georesolveafrica.com/masw-survey-uganda.html) - Multichannel Analysis of Surface Waves for shear-wave velocity (Vs) profiling, Vs30 seismic site classification, and dynamic soil property characterisation for dams, railways, bridges, and buildings.
- [Ground Penetrating Radar Uganda](https://georesolveafrica.com/ground-penetrating-radar-uganda.html) - Non-destructive GPR imaging of shallow subsurface utilities, pavements, voids, and buried features for utility mapping, pavement assessment, and concrete scanning.

## Free Tools
- [G-Resolog](https://georesolveafrica.com/g-resolog.html) - Professional borehole core logger for geotechnical and soil investigation with pattern-based lithology classification, SPT testing, and PDF/Excel export.
- [G-Resconvt](https://georesolveafrica.com/g-resconvt.html) - Professional coordinate converter for East Africa supporting 45+ CRS systems across 8 countries with batch CSV processing.
- [G-Geopylanner](https://georesolveafrica.com/g-geopylanner.html) - Unified geophysics survey planner for MASW, Seismic Refraction, ERT, GPR, magnetic, and gravity survey design.
- [G-FlightPlanner](https://georesolveafrica.com/g-flightplanner.html) - Drone mapping planner for photogrammetry missions with GSD, overlap, flight-line, and KML/Litchi CSV export tools.

## Key Projects
- [Projects Portfolio](https://georesolveafrica.com/projects.html) - 15+ completed and ongoing geoscience projects across Uganda, Rwanda, and Burundi in infrastructure, energy, water, mining, and environmental sectors.

## Quality, Health, Safety & Environment
- [QHSE](https://georesolveafrica.com/quality-hse.html) - How Georesolve assures field data quality (calibration, daily QC, logged-by/checked-by sign-off, independent review, BS 5930 / ISO 14688-14689 / ASTM / ISRM-aligned methods), keeps field crews safe (risk assessments, toolbox talks, PPE, journey management, community liaison, incident reporting), and limits environmental impact (non-invasive methods first, site reinstatement, waste management, respect for protected sites).

## Contact
- Phone: +256771999614
- Email: info@georesolveafrica.com
- [Contact Page](https://georesolveafrica.com/contact.html)

## Français

GeoResolve publie ses pages clés en français pour le Burundi, le Rwanda, l'est de la RDC et l'Afrique de l'Est francophone. Le français est la langue des recherches géoscientifiques dans ces marchés.

- [Accueil (FR)](https://georesolveafrica.com/fr/) — Présentation des services géoscientifiques (géophysique, géotechnique, mines, forage, SIG) en Afrique de l'Est
- [Méthodes (FR)](https://georesolveafrica.com/fr/methods.html) — Méthodes géophysiques, géotechniques, d'exploration et de levés (sismique, ERT, MASW, magnétique, forage, GIS, drone)
- [Applications (FR)](https://georesolveafrica.com/fr/applications.html) — Applications par secteur : barrages, hydrowélectricité, infrastructures, mines, eau, énergie, environnement
- [Contact (FR)](https://georesolveafrica.com/fr/contact.html) — Formulaire de contact et coordonnées (WhatsApp, email, téléphone) en français
- [Géophysique au Burundi (FR)](https://georesolveafrica.com/fr/geophysique-burundi.html) — Études géophysiques et géotechniques au Burundi (Mutambu hydro-solaire, ceinture de roches vertes, barrages)
- [Géophysique à l'est de la RDC (FR)](https://georesolveafrica.com/fr/geophysique-rdc-est.html) — Levés géophysiques à Goma, Bukavu et Ituri (or alluvionnaire, rift du Kivu, pegmatites)
- [Géophysique au Rwanda (FR)](https://georesolveafrica.com/fr/geophysique-rwanda.html) — Études géophysiques au Rwanda (barrages Rweru et Mwogo, MASW Hôpital King Faisal, pegmatites)
